message:
Optimize OpenCode connector part loading to per-message directories

Changes load_messages() to load parts directly from message-specific
subdirectories instead of pre-scanning the entire parts directory:

Before:
- Walked entire part/ directory upfront
- Built HashMap of message_id -> Vec<PartInfo>
- Memory usage scaled with total parts across all sessions

After:
- Loads parts on-demand from part/{message_id}/ directory
- Uses WalkDir with max_depth(1) for single-level scan
- Removes HashMap dependency (no longer needed)
- Memory usage now proportional to single message's parts

The OpenCode storage format organizes parts by message ID in subdirectories,
making the targeted loading approach both simpler and more efficient for
sessions with many messages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
